name: RankedIntervention
what_it_solves: Layer-0 Pydantic/dataclass contract carried by every engine boundary that references RankedIntervention.
how_it_solves: Fields (canonical set): ['axis', 'tier', 'score', 'modality_evidence', 'promotion_source', 'confidence_notes']. See CRISPRO_SL_PHD_ROADMAP.txt Ch 3.2 for the exact schema.
why_it_exists: Per-axis ranked output with tier assignment plus provenance for how the tier was reached.
